title: Grounding
description: Validates a grounding artifact — the per-claim verification of a draft against its source trails. Produced by factcheck; consumed by publish.

claim_verdicts.description: One verdict for every claim in the draft.

unsupported_count.description: The number of claims with an unsupported verdict — the grounding red-signal scalar. Must equal the count of unsupported verdicts. Partially-supported claims are not counted here; they are publishable when honestly qualified.

claim_id.description: The draft claim this verdict judges.

status.description: supported = the cited source fully supports the statement. partially_supported = the source supports the statement only in part or indirectly — publishable only if the draft claim is declared 'qualified' with stated limits. unsupported = the source does not support the statement — must not be published.

checked_against.description: The source examined to reach this verdict.

note.description: Optional explanation of the verdict. For a partially_supported verdict, states what the source does and does not establish.
